---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new component or feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or component you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Implementation

If you have ideas on how this should work, describe them here.

## Component Request (if applicable)

- **Category**: [e.g. buttons, cards, forms]
- **Component Name**: [e.g. ToggleButton]
- **Description**: [What the component does]
- **Reference**: [Link to a design reference or similar component elsewhere]

## Additional Context

Any other context or screenshots.
